name: geodurak
description: GeoDurak - Akıllı Taksi Durağı Yönetim Sistemi

scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,ADMIN,MOBILE" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:mobile"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix admin && npm install --prefix mobile
